creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
First the hylafax port needs to be updated, but thats not the point.
	Even the newest hylafax version states to work only correctly with
	tifflib-3.4! This lib isn't available in the ports tree, and using
	libtiff-3.5 with hylafax leads to nonfunction progs, which consuming
	all of the CPU time if started. The conversion programs from tiff-3.5
	runs well, but the lib must be 3.4.
	So it would be necessary to reaktivate the latest libtiff-3.4 port for
	having a chance to get a running hylafax.

Fix: 

Update hylafax and make it using libtiff-3.4.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Build hylafax and test it. It won't run.
